name: @skelm/memory-system
description: First-party memory-management workflows over agentmemory + durable state.

workflows.description: Append a daily rollup note from recent memories.
Append a daily rollup note from recent memories.
Summarize one session into a durable memory via an agent turn.
Fold aged memories into a weekly archive memory.
Fold near-duplicate memories into consolidated memories.
Promote high-value memories under a promoted concept.
Report stale memory candidates (read-only; no deletion).
Probe search-index health with canary queries (read-only).

config.project: Project string forwarded to every agentmemory op.
config.recallLimit: Max memories any single workflow recalls in one pass.
config.staleAfterMs: Age past which a memory is considered stale.
config.archiveAfterMs: Age past which weekly-archive folds a memory.
config.duplicateScore: Min search score for consolidation to treat memories as duplicates.
config.promoteScore: Min recall score for promotion to elevate a memory.
config.summaryMaxTokens: Token budget hint for the summarization turn.

secrets.name: AGENTMEMORY_TOKEN
secrets.description: Bearer token for the agentmemory server (name only).

triggers.description: Daily note rollup. Disabled until enabled by an operator.
Weekly archive of aged memories. Disabled until enabled by an operator.
Periodic duplicate consolidation. Disabled until enabled by an operator.
Periodic memory promotion. Disabled until enabled by an operator.
Periodic stale-memory scan. Disabled until enabled by an operator.
Periodic search-index health probe. Disabled until enabled by an operator.
Periodic integrity audit. Disabled until enabled by an operator.
